title: Chapter 81
content:
I feel like there has been no proper smut for the last few chapters. Some might find it off putting but putt up with it for a little longer. Lemons are coming. They are coming sooner than you think.

Also, 300k views. I don't know if it's a lot or not, given that a novel I used to read on the same site had seven million views, but it also had 700 and some chapters, so maybe it's that. Anyway, thank you for all your love, and for those who have stuck with me so far, I promise to bring you even more exciting content. Stay tuned.

Enjoy!

~~

Chapter 81

“Huff!!!”

“Huff!!!”

Running through the forest, he had no idea where he was running off to, but he knew one thing for sure. Someone who could corner her servant so much was not a normal man. He was not only strong, he was dangerous as well. There was only one fate that awaited him if he didn’t run faster.

But…

"Huff!!!”

"Huff!!!”

His stomach felt like it was being overturned. His internal organs were screaming in pain. He had run too much. So much so that his body could no longer take it.

But in reality…

“Seriously, giving you half a kilometer was a generous statement.” He heard a smooth voice in front of him and stopped in his tracks. The very same man who was fighting his strongest servant and knight was standing before him now, unharmed and without so much as an increased heart rate, let alone being out of breath.

“Forgi-huff-forgive me… pleasee-huff!!”

The baron could only beg. He was about to offer him wealth and whatever the young man desired, but the next moment, he saw the world upside down and the last words of the young man, “Work out in your next life, you pig.”

~~

I never had the habit of messing with my victims. I killed them fast and straight without any extra chatter.

The same went for Ruuthaven. I knew what he was going to offer and beg for mercy but if it was so easy, then I wouldn’t have had to get involved in this mess in the first place.

I stored all the bodies in my inventory and left the scene after making sure there were no clues left. Of course, cleanly taking care after everything in this massive forest was impossible even for me unless I were to destroy all of it, which would attract even more attention from the royal faction or the bigwigs.

Anyway, the problem I faced now was…

“Where were you, Jack!?” Rayla asked, a terrifying expression on her face. I couldn’t spot Julien, but Lucas was at home, also giving me a stink eye, and as for the sisters, they were leaning more on Rayla’s side.

“You left the mansion, saying you would be going home, but you never came home. Do you know how worried we were? Your father is still out looking for you!” Rayla was pissed, and like every mother, her anger was justified. I, being the wise man I was, let her vent with my head lowered, and when it was time to give an explanation, I simply said…

“I suddenly felt the breakthrough to the next realm and had to construct a second circle away from the city to not be bothered by anyone.”

As it was, the news of me circling up held more weight than anything else. Even Julian, who had an angry expression when he returned, brightened up as soon as he heard that news. It was the same for everyone else, so my mishap was quickly forgotten as Rayla quickly pulled out high-quality meat to serve me and everyone else as a celebration. The rest of the night was uneventful.

Soon, it was time to sleep but there was more to do. I still had one turn of the day which I was thinking of spending with Rayla but she still held some resentment and said…

“While I am happy, Jack, I am also angry at you for what you did. You shall sleep alone tonight.” She said and left for her room, and the same for the sisters, who were also upset with me.

“Haa…” I sighed and returned to my room. Seeing there was nothing else to do, I began to practice my creation skill. I created things from my world since the surprise of making things that never existed in this world, granting me more skill progress, was too much to not take proper advantage of.

Still, I was keeping it simple and straight. Steel poles, concrete slabs, some substances, and such. I only made things that I understood well without any chance of failure.

As an engineer, I had a good understanding of making a car, but the materials required for that were a little difficult. While mana could be compensated for everything, I didn’t know the deep anatomical structure of many things, such as engine oil, gasoline, and such, so making a car was out of the question.

By the time it was morning and time for me to go on my morning run, my skills mastery had increased by a good bit, all the way up to the end of the A rank. It was rising slowly now, but I was sure it would soon rise quite quickly with what I had planned.

~~

I arrived outside the city before the sunrise, and brought out all the substances I had created last night. They were the simpler ones with low atomic structure, so making them wasn’t too difficult after a few failures. Once made, what I made next from then was…

[Creation successful]

[An item that never existed in this world has been created]

[Item: Fertilizer has been added to the Glossary]

The rocks I created that contained Nitrogen, Phosphorus, and Potassium were mixed by perfect ratios using mana as a catalyst to create a magical fertilizer.

[Fertilizer]

[Rank: C]

[Description: A magical substance that has been created through the creativity of the user

A never-before-seen item that comes with many magical aspects

Crops raised by this fertilizer have a 50% chance of gaining an additional effect]

[Effect:

Can raise special crops without damage and kill pesticides]

[Once consumed, the item can never be consumed by the same crop again]

[Skill mastery: +5%]

[Skill ‘Creation’ has been upgraded to S rank]

Dildo, vibrators, thrusters, and many more. There was nothing sexual that came to my mind I hadn’t created yet. The progress they made was massive every time, but not one of them came close to this creation. A whopping five percent increase at such a high level, where creating a preexisting S rank item would have granted me one percent at most, and that was me being delusional.

Happy with what I had made, I began to focus on this aspect until it would burn out like the other creations before this one.

By the time I arrived at home, I had made about 50 bags of fertilizer, and since it was done without a hitch the first time, the rest were easy and I easily made them.

The problem, however, was…

[Mastery: +0.01%]

[S rank: 19.10]

The mastery for the fertilizer had run out, but nothing else came to mind. What else could I make was a question that plagued me the rest of the way. By the time I arrived home, the problem remained the same, and nothing clicked.

But all the problems were pushed to the back of my mind as soon as I saw Rayla in the kitchen, but unfortunately, she wasn’t buck naked this time.

I approached her from behind and cupped her breasts from behind, startling her a little, but she didn’t react that much for someone who was startled.

“Oh, honey, why do you go after my breasts the first thing in the morning?” She asked as she felt me fondling her thoroughly from behind, rubbing my groin in her ass from behind, but there was no sensation below, so I was enjoying my hands more than my groin.

Despicable world.

“Mmm~~ But it feels good.” She couldn’t help but say after taking a deep breath, inhaling that amazing feeling.

“Does it feel good, mother?” I asked.

“It feels different than your usual massage, honey.” She replied with a smile while focusing on her current task.

“What feels so different?” I asked.

“It feels good on my breasts as a whole. They’re too heavy for me to bear all day, so a massage like this feels good.” She replied.

So she feels good from a simple massage. It wasn’t like I didn’t understand the matter at hand. It was evident there was no underwear in this world, and that was a blessing. I was never introducing that in this world, no matter what. Why would I do that when I could access any pussy or boobs without any hindrance?

But for women, especially well-endowed women like Rayla, underwear was necessary as it could prevent the sagging of breasts massively, but I hadn’t seen that in this world as well.

As for the heaviness, a simple massage like this could solve it but what if the massage never had to be done by my hand? What if I could combine two aspects and create something entirely new?

I had no idea if it would work or not, but there was no harm in trying.

Pah!

“Ahn!”

Rayla yelped as I slapped her massive ass from outside her skirt. It didn’t grant me an EXP point since it wasn’t bare, but the effect delivered to Rayla was the same.

“Thank you, mother.”

I said and left her puzzled in the kitchen, and made my way to my room to get started immediately.
